CMS-SA v0.3 — Feedback Quality and Lifecycle Engine
non_claim_lock: validator repair is not code correctness

lesson: Committed public-sync reports must not store volatile commit hashes.
All orchestrator writes must be root-anchored; committed public-sync reports must omit volatile commit hashes.
Validators must advance expected public tokens when checkpoint badges and README status advance.
Clean Git status is not release readiness; release gates must parse validator truth.

next_anchor: v0.3b
lesson: A commit is not only a change; it is a routed event in repository geometry.

next_anchor: v0.3b
lesson: A commit is not only a change; it is a routed event in repository geometry.

next_anchor: v0.3b
lesson: A commit is not only a change; it is a routed event in repository geometry.

next_anchor: v0.3b
lesson: Committed reflective geometry must exclude report-only refresh commits; API transmission must be evidence-bound and validator-gated.

next_anchor: v0.3b
lesson: Observation and validation must be separated from evidence emission.

next_anchor: v0.3c
lesson: Feedback must be typed, scored, classified, downgrade-safe, and validator-bound before promotion.

next_anchor: CMS-SA v0.3b2 - Multi-Level Geometric Alignment Feedback Lock
lesson: Root README sections, mini READMEs, reports, validators, and registry must advance together.

next_anchor: CMS-SA v0.3b2 - Multi-Level Geometric Alignment Feedback Lock
lesson: Alignment repair scripts must be file-run and version-token updates must be idempotent.

next_anchor: CMS-SA v0.3b3 - Runtime Decision Kernel and Replay Ledger
lesson: Feedback items must bind to geometry, evidence, validators, and current public surfaces before promotion.

next_anchor: CMS-SA v0.3b3 - Runtime Decision Kernel and Replay Ledger
lesson: After a major runtime lock, public README coherence must be sealed as its own surface.
non_claim_lock: Documentation coherence is not code correctness.

next_anchor: CMS-SA v0.3b3 - Runtime Decision Kernel and Replay Ledger
lesson: Documentation coherence scripts must use literal replacements for README code blocks and must not continue after normalizer failure.
non_claim_lock: Documentation coherence is not code correctness.

next_anchor: CMS-SA v0.3b3 - Runtime Decision Kernel and Replay Ledger
lesson: A documentation checkpoint is not sealed until mini README tokens, registry version, alignment report version, and validator expectations all agree.
non_claim_lock: Documentation validator compatibility is not code correctness.

next_anchor: CMS-SA v0.3b3 - Runtime Decision Kernel and Replay Ledger
lesson: Version advancement scripts must replace exact stale tokens only and assert no duplicated suffix patterns remain.
non_claim_lock: Version token normalization is not code correctness.
